r.c: relative pronoun; subject relative in the standard language
noun; cf. [w ezyk] for "language" as an abstract category
noun; canonical word for "language"; velar mutation in obl/pl: [w ezyk :i o], [w ezyk :i p]
noun; fossilized front-vowel velar mutation in oblique/plural forms
noun; fossilized front-vowel velar mutation in plural [w sneh :i p]
noun; affricate [st ц :t c] retained, preconsonantal [st в :t v] vocalizes to [st у :t u]
noun; vocalization of preconsonantal [st в :t v]
noun; often used in the plural for "clothes"
adjective; agrees in m.sg/f.sg/n.sg/pl; prenominal also common
adjective; vowel retained before liquid to avoid syllabic [st р :t r]
adjective; strong ь → е; [st ч :t č] retained, [st е :t e] kept before liquid
place name; regular capitalized name of the country/land
masculine inhabitant noun; stem [st стирц- :t styrc-] in plural, oblique, and related forms; lower-case except sentence-initially

ordinary ethnolinguistic adjective; masculine ends in -[st ски :t sky] (Cyrillic [st и :t y], back vowel); fuller formal variant [st стирянски :t styrjansky]; attributive: [w styrsky] [w ezyk] "the Styrian language"; lexicalized language noun: [st стиршчіна :t styrščina]
feminine noun; canonical lexicalized name of the Styrian language; oblique [st стиршчіне :t styrščine]; used in [w po] + obl. construction for "speak Styrian"
a-class impf.; n-part. [w pysat :i nm]/[w pysat :i nf]/[w pysat :i nn]/[w pysat :i np] ([st писан :t pysan]/[st писана :t pysana]/[st писано :t pysano]/[st писані :t pysani])
a-class pf.; n-part. [w napysat :i nm]/[w napysat :i nf]/[w napysat :i nn]/[w napysat :i np] ([st написан :t napysan]/[st написана :t napysana]/[st написано :t napysano]/[st написані :t napysani])
a-class impf.; n-part. [w delat :i nm]/[w delat :i nf]/[w delat :i nn]/[w delat :i np] ([st делан :t delan]/[st делана :t delana]/[st делано :t delano]/[st делані :t delani])
a-class pf.; n-part. [w sdelat :i nm]/[w sdelat :i nf]/[w sdelat :i nn]/[w sdelat :i np] ([st сделан :t sdelan]/[st сделана :t sdelana]/[st сделано :t sdelano]/[st сделані :t sdelani])
a-class impf. (irregular stem: [st покаж :t pokaž]- before [st а :t a])
i-class impf.; n-part. [w vydit :i nm]/[w vydit :i nf]/[w vydit :i nn]/[w vydit :i np] ([st виден :t vyden]/[st видена :t vydena]/[st видено :t vydeno]/[st видені :t vydeni])

i-class impf.; multidirectional; habitual or repeated carrying; unidirectional counterpart is [w nesat]; n-part. [w nosit :i nm]/[w nosit :i nf]/[w nosit :i nn]/[w nosit :i np] ([st ношен :t nošen]/[st ношена :t nošena]/[st ношено :t nošeno]/[st ношені :t nošeni]) — note š < *s+j iotation

a-class impf.; unidirectional; nasal-stem, regularized to a-class in Period III; multidirectional counterpart is [w nosit]; present: [w nesat :i 1s]/[w nesat :i 2s]/[w nesat :i 3s]/[w nesat :i 1p]/[w nesat :i 2p]/[w nesat :i 3p]; l-part. [w nesat :i lm]
irregular; unidirectional; single directed trip; l-part. [w ydat :i lm]; multidirectional counterpart is [w xodit]
i-class impf.; multidirectional; cf. Czech chodit, Sln. hoditi; present: [w xodit :i 1s]/[w xodit :i 2s]/[w xodit :i 3s]/[w xodit :i 1p]/[w xodit :i 2p]/[w xodit :i 3p]; l-part. [w xodit :i lm]
a-class impf.; unidirectional; single directed run; multidirectional counterpart is [w behat]; present: [w bežat :i 1s]/[w bežat :i 2s]/[w bežat :i 3s]/[w bežat :i 1p]/[w bežat :i 2p]/[w bežat :i 3p]
a-class impf.; multidirectional; note г = /ɦ/ in romanization; present: [w behat :i 1s]/[w behat :i 2s]/[w behat :i 3s]/[w behat :i 1p]/[w behat :i 2p]/[w behat :i 3p]
irregular; n-part. uses short stem: [w dat :i nm]/[w dat :i nf]/[w dat :i nn]/[w dat :i np] ([st дан :t dan]/[st дана :t dana]/[st дано :t dano]/[st дані :t dani]) (from PSl. *danъ)

irregular pf.; t-class n-part.: [w vzeti :i nm]/[w vzeti :i nf]/[w vzeti :i nn]/[w vzeti :i np] ([st взет :t vzet]/[st взета :t vzeta]/[st взето :t vzeto]/[st взеті :t vzeti]); l-part. [w vzeti :i lp] etc.
a-class impf.; short-root n-part.: [w tkat :i nm]/[w tkat :i nf]/[w tkat :i nn]/[w tkat :i np] ([st ткан :t tkan]/[st ткана :t tkana]/[st ткано :t tkano]/[st ткані :t tkani])

a-class impf./pf.; n-part. [w ukrstovat :i nm]/[w ukrstovat :i nf]/[w ukrstovat :i nn]/[w ukrstovat :i np] ([st укрстован :t ukrstovan]/[st укрстована :t ukrstovana]/[st укрстовано :t ukrstovano]/[st укрстовані :t ukrstovani])
to go out, exit; to come out (in print, of results)

i-class impf.; ви- prefix (West Slavic stratum); present: [w vyxodit :i 1s]/[w vyxodit :i 2s]/[w vyxodit :i 3s]/[w vyxodit :i 1p]/[w vyxodit :i 2p]/[w vyxodit :i 3p]; cf. Czech vycházet; broader figurative range than directional [w yzxodit]
pf.; ви- prefix; present stem [st вибир- :t vybyr-]: [w vybrat :i 1s]/[w vybrat :i 2s]/[w vybrat :i 3s]; l-part. [w vybrat :i lm]; impf. [w vybyrat]; cf. Czech vybrat
to write out, copy out; to fill out (a form)
pf. a-class; ви- prefix; present: [w vypysat :i 1s]/[w vypysat :i 2s]/[w vypysat :i 3s]; l-part. [w vypysat :i lm]; cf. Czech vypsat
to teach (sb.) thoroughly, train, instruct to completion
pf. i-class; ви- prefix; present: [w vyučit :i 1s]/[w vyučit :i 2s]/[w vyučit :i 3s]; l-part. [w vyučit :i lm]; cf. Czech vyučit; emphasizes completeness of teaching
to drive out, expel, chase away
pf.; ви- prefix; suppletive present from *goniti: [w vyhnat :i 1s]/[w vyhnat :i 2s]/[w vyhnat :i 3s]; l-part. [w vyhnat :i lm]; cf. Czech vyhnat
to come out, emerge (from a space)
i-class impf.; из- prefix; directional (physical emergence); cf. [w vyxodit] which has broader figurative range
adverb / conjunction; temporal interrogative and relative
